thought.text: Now I understand the scope. I need to massively extend the grammar and Ast2Asg. Let me plan and implement:

task_list.title: Extend SYsULexer.tokens to include all new token types
Extend SYsULexer.cpp clang->antlr mapping to cover new tokens
Rewrite SYsUParser.g4 with full C-like grammar (precedence ladder, void/const, if/else, while, break/continue, function call, multiplicative, relational, equality, logical, etc.)

Extend Ast2Asg.{hpp,cpp} to handle new expressions (multiplicative/relational/equality/logical/parens/calls/index/unary !), statements (if/while/break/continue), declarations (void, const, function params)
Iteratively fix failing cases until task2-score is maxed

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "Plan tasks for Task 2", "task_list": [{"status": "todo", "title": "Extend SYsULexer.tokens to include all new token types"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Extend SYsULexer.cpp clang->antlr mapping to cover new tokens"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Rewrite SYsUParser.g4 with full C-like grammar (precedence ladder, void/const, if/else, while, break/continue, function call, multiplicative, relational, equality, logical, etc.)"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Extend Ast2Asg.{hpp,cpp} to handle new expressions (multiplicative/relational/equality/logical/parens/calls/index/unary !), statements (if/while/break/continue), declarations (void, const, function params)"}, {"status": "todo", "title": "Iteratively fix failing cases until task2-score is maxed"}]}
